title: Soulful Japa : Session 4 : Mindless japa, Mindful japa, and Soulful japa - Module 4

When we hear the sound, the sound enters our heart and the sound enters our heart, the sound is not, the sound incarnation is with all his energies, Satchitananda energies and there is a flow of mercy of the Lord in the form of Sattva, Chitta and Ananda, mercy into our heart which cleanses our heart.

This is the heart of Asat Achit Nirananda. This is a reality, this is an actual phenomena that is happening and we discussed yesterday that the biggest challenge, the first biggest challenge is to connect our Chitta with the Lord who has created us.

The Chitta has descended down and that is only possible through the conduit of attention. So the mind is the carrier of attention. Attention is a property of the soul, it's the energy of the soul. I am, I as a soul, I am where my attention is.
So if I have to touch the holy name, my attention has to be there on the holy name, on the sound.
And mind is now in our conditioned state, he is a master of wherever it wants it to take the attention. Our attention is completely given over to the mind.
So therefore disciplining the mind is so important to ensure that the attention connection is there.
It is not very difficult because the mind is our servant. If the mind is taking away our attention here and there, it is because we have trained our mind in that way.
We can train our mind the way we want. It will again start listening to us.
So this secret, the mind does not have any power over you other than the power that you have given to the mind.
So there are two stages of development of our Japa.
Voluntarily we discipline our mind to establish and stay connected with the Nama Avatara.
